name: White Chocolate Mousse - Great Chefs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, heat the sugar and water until the mixture forms a soft ball.
2. Beat the egg whites in a bowl to medium stiff peaks using a mixer (first on medium speed, then on high).
3. Add the sugar and water from the saucepan to the beaten egg whites and continue beating briefly to form a stiff meringue.
4. In a metal bowl, beat the egg yolks over heat with a whisk. Stir in the rum while continuing to beat over heat.
5. Gently fold the beaten egg yolks into the egg white mixture.
6. Gently fold the melted chocolate into the egg yolk mixture.
7. Refrigerate the mousse for 3 to 4 hours before serving.
